purpose: Tie production integration families to ownership, release prerequisites, dependency triggers, generated-project boundaries, evidence, and rollback decisions.

releasePolicy.fallbackPolicy: Block release promotion when an affected integration family lacks an owner, dependency trigger, generated-project boundary, release prerequisite, local gate, and rollback note.
releasePolicy.generatedProjectPolicy: Dependencies used only by generated services or examples must stay in the generated project go.mod or temporary fixture module and must not pollute the root module.

integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: storage driver, SQL dialect, transaction, outbox, migration fixture, or generated model dependency changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated SQL/model-only dependencies must be written to the generated project's go.mod or temp-module fixture, never to the gofly root go.mod.
integrations.rollbackNote: Pin the previous storage driver or generated model profile and keep the old repository path serving until SQL, outbox, dependency, and integration evidence pass.

integrations.surface: cache, core/kv/redis, and generated model cache
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: Redis client, cache invalidation, Redis Stream codec, generated cache template, or tiered cache behavior changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated Redis cache examples must keep Redis-only dependencies inside generated projects or examples, with root dependency policy evidence for any root import.
integrations.rollbackNote: Disable Redis-backed cache or pin the previous Redis profile when cache invalidation, stream delivery, dependency, or required integration evidence fails.

integrations.surface: core/mq, transactional outbox, and worker examples
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: producer, consumer, retry, broker client, serialization, outbox relay, or message governance changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Broker-specific generated worker dependencies must stay in generated worker modules or examples unless a root package imports them directly.
integrations.rollbackNote: Keep the prior broker route or outbox relay profile active until MQ integration logs, delivery semantics, and dependency evidence converge.

integrations.surface: core/discovery, rpc discovery, and config discovery overlays
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: discovery client, lease, watch, resolver, balancer, health filtering, metadata filtering, or TLS changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated discovery overlays may reference profiles, but provider client dependencies must follow root dependency policy or stay in generated modules.
integrations.rollbackNote: Keep memory discovery or the previous registry path available until resolver updates, leases, watches, and required integration evidence pass.

integrations.surface: gateway, API contracts, and HTTP transcoding descriptors
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: gateway route, descriptor, OpenAPI, protobuf, HTTP transcoding, resolver, or routing policy changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated gateway descriptors and clients must be reproducible in generated projects and must not require root module generated-only dependencies.
integrations.rollbackNote: Route traffic back to the previous gateway or descriptor profile until routing, transcoding, resolver, and contract evidence pass.

integrations.surface: rpc, rpc/grpc, gateway, and generated service RPC contracts
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: RPC descriptor, grpc dependency, stream governance, resolver, balancer, retry, deadline, auth, or tracing changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated RPC clients, descriptors, and compatibility shims must stay deterministic and keep transport-specific dependencies in the generated module when not imported by root packages.
integrations.rollbackNote: Keep Kitex or native gRPC-Go endpoints reachable for latency-critical or compatibility-sensitive workloads until RPC boundary evidence and release gates pass.

integrations.surface: core/observability, runtime SLO, governance dashboard, and release evidence
integrations.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: OpenTelemetry exporter, Prometheus metrics, trace context, runtime SLO, governance report, or release evidence changes
integrations.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated services may emit observability signals, but exporter-only dependencies must stay in generated projects or examples unless root packages import them.
integrations.rollbackNote: Pin the previous telemetry profile or disable the new exporter until runtime SLO, dashboard, release evidence, and smoke checks pass.

adopterProofRows.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated SQL repositories and model-only dependencies must stay in generated project go.mod files or isolated temp modules, never as unexplained root module dependencies.
adopterProofRows.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: SQL driver, dialect, transaction, outbox, generated model, pagination, or optimistic-lock template changes require DB/cache productization and dependency evidence review.
adopterProofRows.observabilityEvidence: SQLStore snapshots expose database, operation, transaction, and error stats that adopters can inspect before promoting generated repository output.
adopterProofRows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to the previous repository path or sqlite-memory smoke fixture when networked SQL dependencies are unavailable or generated compile evidence fails.
adopterProofRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous storage driver or generated model profile until SQL, outbox, generated boundary, dependency, and integration evidence pass.

adopterProofRows.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated Redis cache repositories must keep Redis-only dependencies inside generated projects or examples unless root packages import the dependency directly.
adopterProofRows.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: Redis client, cache invalidation, stream codec, TTL, negative-cache, generated cache template, or tiered cache behavior changes require DB/cache productization review.
adopterProofRows.observabilityEvidence: Cache stats and Prometheus output expose hits, misses, loader errors, Redis miss semantics, and invalidation evidence for generated model cache adoption.
adopterProofRows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to GOFLY_CACHE_DISABLED=true, local typed cache, or direct SQL reads when Redis is unavailable or cache invalidation evidence diverges.
adopterProofRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable Redis-backed cache or pin the previous Redis profile until cache stats, generated boundary, dependency, and smoke evidence pass.

adopterProofRows.generatedProjectBoundary: Generated discovery overlays may reference provider profiles, but provider client dependencies must follow root dependency policy or stay in generated modules.
adopterProofRows.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: Discovery client, lease, watch, resolver, balancer, health filtering, metadata filtering, TLS, or generated profile changes require discovery matrix review.
adopterProofRows.observabilityEvidence: Discovery adapter matrix records register, resolve, watch, TTL lease, health filtering, metadata filtering, failover, and release gates for adopter decisions.
adopterProofRows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to memory discovery, previous registry configuration, or platform-native discovery when networked registries are unavailable or watch evidence fails.
adopterProofRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep memory discovery or the previous registry path active until resolver, lease, watch, generated boundary, and integration evidence pass.
